mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_code, product_name, product_type, risk_level, expected_return, min_amount, term_days, status, created_at) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productType}, #{riskLevel}, #{expectedReturn}, #{minAmount}, #{termDays}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT product_code FROM product ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
